name: Iowa 80 Truckstop (TA Walcott)
description: The World's Largest Truckstop, a 220-acre complex with ~900 truck parking spaces, multiple restaurants, 24 private showers, a service center, truck wash and CAT Scale, open 24/7.

name: Pilot Travel Center - Walcott (3500 N Plainview)
description: Pilot Travel Center at I-80 Exit 284 with about 160 truck parking spaces, 11 diesel lanes, showers and an Arby's, open 24 hours.

name: Pilot Travel Center - Walcott (2975 N Plainview)
description: Pilot Travel Center at I-80 Exit 284 with 10 diesel lanes, showers and a Subway, open 24 hours.

name: Love's Travel Stop #476
description: Love's Travel Stop at I-80 Exit 292 providing 24/7 diesel and gas fueling, a convenience store, food and showers.

name: Flying J Travel Center #636
description: Flying J travel plaza at I-80 Exit 292 with about 146 truck parking spaces, 12 diesel lanes, 15 showers, a Denny's and a CAT Scale, open 24 hours.

name: Kum & Go - Coralville
description: 24-hour fuel stop at I-80 Exit 242 with diesel lanes, a convenience store and deli and a small number of truck parking spaces.

name: CAT Scale (Iowa 80 Truckstop)
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Iowa 80 Truckstop complex off I-80 Exit 284.

name: Truckomat Truck Wash
description: 24-hour truck and RV wash at the Iowa 80 Truckstop complex off I-80 Exit 284, offering fuel discounts when washing and fueling the same day.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Walcott
description: Blue Beacon truck and trailer wash located near the Iowa 80 Truckstop at I-80 Exit 284.

name: Iowa 80 Truck Service Center (TA)
description: Full-service truck and trailer repair center at the Iowa 80 Truckstop off I-80 Exit 284, offering tire service and road service.

name: Days Inn by Wyndham Walcott Davenport
description: Hotel just off I-80 Exit 284 near the Iowa 80 Truckstop offering free truck, bus and RV parking.

name: I-80 Wilton Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: Iowa DOT eastbound rest area near I-80 mile marker 270 with truck and car parking, restrooms, vending and Wi-Fi.

name: I-80 Wilton Welcome Center (Westbound)
description: Iowa DOT westbound welcome center/rest area at I-80 mile marker 270 with truck and car parking, restrooms, vending and Wi-Fi.
